subject: Fwd: Sikorsky 667.pdf
body:
Reenstra has an offer for the helicopter.? $12.8 MM Gross.? Commissions of $250,000 to purchaser's rep and $150,000 to Reenstra, net you $12.4 MM.? Please advise if you have any interest.


-----Original Message-----
From: George Reenstra <g.reenstra@yourjet.com>
To: DKIESQ@aol.com
Sent: Thu, 8 Nov 2007 9:52 am
Subject: Sikorsky 667.pdf



 <<Sikorsky 667.pdf>> 
Attached are the 2 documents regarding the deal, the client is ready to
move ASAP. Money is set to attach to offer when executed and he will fly
up Monday to see it.   Please advise, as you can see on my website
yourjet.com  I have another new one which I own however that does not
deliver until May so I have more time to sell it, would prefer getting
this one sold since it is available now. 


We can either sell it direct to him or from you to me then I will sell
to him


________________________________________________________________________
Email and AIM finally together. You've gotta check out free AOL Mail! - http://mail.aol.com
